candidate_check.description: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS must produce audit records and reports containing information to establish when, where, what type, the source, and the outcome for all DOD-defined auditable events and actions in near real time.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the "auditd.service" is enabled and active by using the following commands:  
  
     $ systemctl is-enabled auditd.service 
     enabled 
  
     $ systemctl is-active auditd.service 
     active  
  
If the "auditd.service" is not enabled and active, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Enable and start the "auditd.service" by using the following command:  
  
     $ sudo systemctl enable auditd.service --now
title: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS must produce audit records and reports containing information to establish when, where, what type, the source, and the outcome for all DOD-defined auditable events and actions in near real time.
